sentences: Here, the feature reconstruction term is <MATH_054> .
It is the mean-squared error between l2 (normalized) features of patches obtained from the <ENT_015> backbone.
Multi-query Localization: The decoder of <ENT_008> takes object queries as input to focus on different positions and box sizes.
When this object queries a number N (typically N = 100) that is high, a single-query group is unsuitable as it has convergence issues.
To solve the multi-query localization problem between object queries and patches, <ENT_017> proposes an attention mask and query shuffle mechanism.
The number of object queries is divided into X different groups, where each patch is provided to N/X object queries.
The <ENT_071> layer of the self-attention module in the decoder is modified by adding an attention mask inspired by <REF_094> as follows:
